function.name: find_files
function.description: Find files matching glob patterns with intelligent pattern enhancement and workspace-aware searching. Automatically optimizes patterns for better matching and provides ranked results.

search_dir.description: Directory to search in (defaults to workspace root). Supports workspace-relative paths.

patterns.description: Glob patterns to match. Patterns are automatically enhanced (e.g., 'file.js' becomes '**/file.js')

max_matches.description: Maximum number of matches to return (default: 50)

include_hidden.description: Include hidden files and directories (default: false)

sort_by.description: Sort results by relevance, name, modification time, or size (default: relevance)

content_filter.description: Search for files containing this text (case-insensitive). Enables content-based filtering.

exclude_patterns.description: Glob patterns to exclude from search (e.g., ['node_modules/**', '*.log'])

commonErrors.suggestedAction: Use ls to explore directory structure
Simplify pattern or use glob tool for single patterns
Use more specific patterns or reduce search scope

gpt-4.1.description: Patterns are automatically enhanced for GPT-4.1 compatibility
